Description.value: I first navigate to the kitchen counter so it can reach the work area. I then prepare the cleaning tool and wipe the surface to remove dirt and leave the counter clean.

Need.value: I need to be able to reach the area that is dirty.

Description.value: I prepare for navigation and then move to the counter.

Need.value: I need to be ready and capable of moving safely to the kitchen counter.
I need to reach the kitchen counter so I can perform cleaning tasks there.
I need to free the counter from dirt and dust.

Description.value: I wipe the kitchen counter to remove dirt and maintain a clean surface. I prepare the cleaning tool, apply cleaner, and wipe the surface.

Need.value: I need an appropriate cleaning tool to remove dirt from the counter surface.
I need to loosen and dissolve dirt so it can be removed effectively.
I need to physically remove the loosened dirt and cleaning residue from the counter.
